name: antijudol
description: Proxy and instrument Donation platform overlay to inspect WebSocket messages

scripts.start: bun run build:inject && ENVIRONMENT=production bun run src/server.js
scripts.dev: bun run build:inject && ENVIRONMENT=development bun --watch run src/server.js
scripts.test: bun run build:inject && bun test tests/
scripts.build:inject: bun build client/inject.js --outfile public/inject.js --target browser --format iife
